english: Shiva, Shambhu, Mahashambhu, Shankara, cause of all
roman: Shiva Shambhu Mahashambhu Shankara sarva karana

hindi: नमः शिवाय नमः शम्भवाय, नमो भवाय च।
english: Salutations to Shiva, to Shambhu, salutations to Bhava
roman: Namah Shivaya namah Shambhavaya namo Bhavaya cha

english: Salutations to Mahadeva, salutations to the fierce Shiva
roman: Namo Maha devaya namashchandaya vah Shivah

english: Salutations to the wielder of the Pinaka bow, salutations to the bow-bearer
Salutations to the destroyer of sacrifices, salutations to the matted-haired one
roman: Namah kratugh ne namah Kapardine namah

english: Whoever reads the Shiva Sahasranama Stotram daily with reverence
roman: Shiva sahasranama stotram yah pathet nityam adratah

english: Attains union with Shiva and is freed from all sins
roman: Shiva sayujyam apnoti sarva papat pramuchyate
